description: Garage orchestration contract. Defines the end-to-end flow from user intent to certified merge. This is the central coordination layer that binds agents, runtime, and certification into a single deterministic pipeline.

stage_3_mount.name: Execution runner mounts target repo
stage_3_mount.output: Isolated repository clone with scope lock

stage_4_db_validation.name: DB Agent validates schema impact
stage_4_db_validation.on_failure: Execution blocked. WORK_PACKET returned to Planner with failure details.

stage_5_execute.name: Worker executes against mounted repo
stage_5_execute.output: Modified files + required artifacts + execution log
stage_5_execute.constraints: File modifications limited to file_targets. Timeout per execution_type.

stage_6_collect.name: Artifact writer collects and hashes outputs
stage_6_collect.output: Hashed artifact bundle ready for audit

stage_7_audit.name: Auditor evaluates execution against doctrine
stage_7_audit.handoff_to: Signature Engine (if PASS) or Human (if FAIL)

stage_7b_sanitation.name: Sanitation pass validates workspace cleanliness
stage_7b_sanitation.condition: Audit classification is PASS. Sanitation runs ONLY after Auditor PASS.
stage_7b_sanitation.on_failure: sanitation_status === FAIL blocks certification. New WORK_PACKET required to remediate.
stage_7b_sanitation.handoff_to: Signature Engine (if CLEAN or PASS_WITH_WARNINGS) or Human (if FAIL)

stage_8_certify.name: Signature engine issues certification
stage_8_certify.condition: Audit classification is PASS AND sanitation_status is CLEAN or PASS_WITH_WARNINGS

planner_halt.trigger: Ambiguous intent, missing target_repo, protected asset touched
planner_halt.resolution: Human provides clarification. Planner generates new WORK_PACKET.

mount_failure.resolution: Target repo must be brought into doctrine compliance before execution.

db_validation_failure.trigger: Schema changes violate CTB registry, cardinality, or immutability rules
db_validation_failure.resolution: Worker must not execute. Planner revises scope or human approves exception via ADR.

scope_violation.trigger: Worker attempts to modify files outside file_targets
scope_violation.resolution: Worker halts. New WORK_PACKET required with corrected scope.

audit_fail_execution.resolution: New WORK_PACKET. Worker re-executes with corrections.

audit_fail_scope.trigger: Scope boundary violated, protected assets modified
audit_fail_scope.resolution: New WORK_PACKET. Planner must narrow or correct scope.

sanitation_fail.trigger: Workspace has untracked files, temp files, scope leak, missing artifacts, or uncommitted generated files
sanitation_fail.resolution: New WORK_PACKET required. Worker re-executes with cleanup. Sanitation re-runs after next Auditor PASS.

certification_fail.trigger: Signature invalid, hash mismatch, doctrine version stale
certification_fail.resolution: Re-run pipeline from appropriate stage. Stale doctrine requires doctrine update first.

invariants: One WORK_PACKET per pipeline run. No batching.
Artifacts are the only handoff mechanism between stages. No peer-to-peer agent communication.
Every stage is deterministic. Same inputs produce same outputs.
Human is sovereign at every decision point. Agents execute within declared boundaries.
No stage may be skipped. Pipeline is sequential from intent to merge.
Certification is the only path to merge. No uncertified merges.
